creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! You will see the change some hours later, when our 
documentation set has been rebuilt from sources. 
I only have done very minor changes in the wording. The markup was perfect, 
except two small nits: 
1, we use double spaces after sentences 
2, there was a superfluous whitespace in an empty line
